title: ajax bicolor var. breviflos
intro: Ajax bicolor var. breviflos, also known as African Ginger, is a plant species belonging to the Zingiberaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of Ajax bicolor var. breviflos can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
